'''''Ng'ok''''' was a [[Speeder/Legends|speeder]] used by a [[Sith Lord/Legends|Sith Lord]] at the [[Battle of Mizra]]. It was named after the [[Ng'ok/Legends|Ng'ok]] creature.

==Sources==
*<!-- 2005-10-25 -->''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''
